actions.name: Talons
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Aerial reconnaissance with exceptional perception
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flight to avoid ground threats while observing
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 slashing per hit, minimal direct combat
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP, dies to single hit
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for scouting, familiars, and aerial surveillance
